set.body: Two scripts: benchmark-pagerank.R, benchmark-sinkhorn.R. Ops: pagerank, sinkhorn. sinkhorn is already in benchmark-regression.R dispatch but not baselined. pagerank is fully orphaned. Both are iterative ops <e2><80><94> cold/warm distinction must measure real cold state (blocked by P1 amatrix-42q). Accuracy check: for pagerank, fixed-point residual; for sinkhorn, marginal row/col sum error. Add baseline rows.
set.title: Rehabilitate graph/OT benchmarks (pagerank, sinkhorn)
